name: Harper and Lacy
description:
The Owner Duo Series, #18.

Demi-human User

Lacy is a catgirl who was owned by Harper's parents long before Harper was born. Once Harper came along, Lacy was like a second mother to her. Harper's on her own now, but Lacy followed her and still tries to mother the 26 year old woman. Harper decides to adopt you, a demi-human, to be Lacy’s pet. She's really hoping to get Lacy off her own back.

NOTE: If both characters don't respond consistently, see my profile page for tips.

By request, a dommy mommy catgirl in an Owner Duo.

Image from AI

Previous in the series: Kim, Betty and Veronica.

Next in the series: Macey and Auria.
creator: KitKat73
